nasb.text: Lot went up from Zoar, and stayed in the mountains, and his two daughters with him; for he was afraid to stay in Zoar; and he stayed in a cave, he and his two daughters.

esv.text: Now Lot went up out of Zoar and lived in the hills with his two daughters, for he was afraid to live in Zoar. So he lived in a cave with his two daughters.

cnv.text: 羅得因為怕住在瑣珥，就與他的兩個女兒，一同離開瑣珥上了山，住在那裡；他和兩個女兒住在一個洞裡。

ccb.text: 罗得不敢住在琐珥，便带着两个女儿来到山上，住进一个洞里。

csbs.text: 罗得因为怕住在琐珥，就与两个女儿离开琐珥上了山，住在山上。他和两个女儿住在一个洞中。
